module.name: proof
module.description: A proof block — an italic "Proof." lead and a QED tombstone (∎) at the end. Body = the proof (Markdown + math).
module.aiSpec:
A PROOF block for maths slides — leads with an italic "Proof." and ends with a right-aligned hollow QED square □. Block module: the body is the argument (Markdown, with inline \(math\) and display \[math\]). Parameters: `label` (text, default "Proof") — the lead word (e.g. "Sketch", "Lemma", "証明"). `qed` (text, default "□") — the end symbol; set to "" to hide it. `accent` (color, default inherit) — colors the lead word, QED mark and (if on) the rule. `border` (boolean, default false) — draw a left accent rule beside the proof. `fontsize` (text CSS length, default inherit) — font size of the whole block, e.g. 0.9em or 15px.
<!-- @proof label: Sketch, accent: #7c3aed, border: true --> Assume \(n\) is even, so \(n = 2k\). Then \(n^2 = 4k^2\) is divisible by 4. <!-- @end -->

param.name: label
param.label: Lead word
param.desc: The italic lead word before the proof, e.g. Sketch or Lemma.

param.name: qed
param.label: End symbol
param.desc: Tombstone shown at the end; set empty to hide.

param.name: accent
param.label: Accent color
param.desc: Colors the lead word, end symbol and rule; blank = inherit text color.

param.name: border
param.label: Left rule
param.desc: Draw a left accent rule beside the proof.

param.name: fontsize
param.label: Font size
param.desc: CSS length for the whole block, e.g. 0.9em; blank = inherit.

snippet.label: Proof (with QED)
snippet.text: <!-- @proof --> Suppose \(n\) is even. Then \(n = 2k\), so \(n^2 = 4k^2 = 2(2k^2)\) is even. \(\square\) <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: Italic "Proof." lead and a ∎ tombstone at the end.
